case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. MANUEL ANTON GARCIA MARADIAGA

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) MARICRUZ CEDANO, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
ORDER RE: PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT MARADIAGA, MANUEL ANTON GARCIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-14-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $50.00) SERVED JUL-07-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MARADIAGA, MANUEL ANTON GARCIA

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. REPRESENTED BY MARICRUZ CEDANO LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MANUEL ANTON GARCIA MARADIAGA IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
